name: Kong Ling
description: '''Kong Ling''' ({{zh|c=|first=t|s=江玲}}; born c. 1935) was a 1960s [[Hong Kong]]–based singing star and recording artist who sang in various genres, including [[Jazz]], [[Cha-cha-cha (music)|Cha cha]], [[Hong Kong English pop]], [[Rock and roll]] and [[Pop music]]. She had also recorded with the popular Hong Kong pop group [[Society of Seven|The Fabulous Echoes]].
